TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Almazbek_Atambayev, title = Almazbek_Atambayev, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Almazbek_Atambayev} }

S.FORM: == Almazbek Atambayev == u ngangan nu Hulam: ťėŅÁąĺť¶¨ŤĆ≤Śą•ŚÖč¬∑ťėŅŚĚ¶Ś∑īŤÄ∂Ś§ę u siwkay niza 9 bulad 17 demiad, Almazbek Atambayev, u misingkiway. 1956 a mihca nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Kazakhstan ayza sa ci Almazbek Atambayev, micakat a demiad sa i 2011 a mihca 12 bulad 1 demiad. u kulit nu hata nu Kazakhstan situsa a kulit, u sumanahay atu takuliway. kakuniza u nasulitan nu Hulam atu Amilika Almazbek Sharshenovich Atambayev has been the President of Kyrgyzstan since 1 December 2011. He was Prime Minister of Kyrgyzstan from 17 December 2010 to 1 December 2011, and from 29 March 2007 to 28 November 2007. He served as Chairman of the Social Democratic Party of Kyrgyzstan (SDPK) from 30 July 1999 to 23 September 2011.
S.PHON: == ar~…ĺmazb…ôk atambaj…ô* == u ŇčaŇčan nu ńßur~…ĺam: ************ u siwkaj niza * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, ar~…ĺmazb…ôk atambaj…ô*, u misiŇčkiwaj. **** a mińß ¶a nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan. u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) nu kazakńßstan ajza sa ¶i ar~…ĺmazb…ôk atambaj…ô*, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶a ** bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad. u kur~…ĺit nu ńßata nu kazakńßstan situsa a kur~…ĺit, u sumanańßaj atu takur~…ĺiwaj. kakuniza u nasur~…ĺitan nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika ar~…ĺmazb…ôk sńßarsńß…ôno*i ¶ńß atambaj…ô* ńßas b…ô…ôn tńß…ô pr…ôsid…ônt of kjrgjzstan sin ¶…ô * d…ô ¶…ômb…ôr ****. ńß…ô was prim…ô minist…ôr of kjrgjzstan from ** d…ô ¶…ômb…ôr **** to * d…ô ¶…ômb…ôr ****, and from ** mar ¶ńß **** to ** no*…ômb…ôr ****. ńß…ô s…ôr*…ôd as ¶ńßairman of tńß…ô so ¶iar~…ĺ d…ômo ¶rati ¶ partj of kjrgjzstan (sdpk) from ** *ur~…ĺj **** to ** s…ôpt…ômb…ôr ****.
S.FORM: == Almazbek Atambayev == u ngangan nu Hulam: ťėŅÁąĺť¶¨ŤĆ≤Śą•ŚÖč¬∑ťėŅŚĚ¶Ś∑īŤÄ∂Ś§ę u siwkay niza 9 bulad 17 demiad, Almazbek Atambayev, u misingkiway. 1956 a mihca nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Kazakhstan ayza sa ci Almazbek Atambayev, micakat a demiad sa i 2011 a mihca 12 bulad 1 demiad. u kulit nu hata nu Kazakhstan situsa a kulit, u sumanahay atu takuliway. kakuniza u nasulitan nu Hulam atu Amilika Almazbek Sharshenovich Atambayev has been the President of Kyrgyzstan since 1 December 2011. He was Prime Minister of Kyrgyzstan from 17 December 2010 to 1 December 2011, and from 29 March 2007 to 28 November 2007. He served as Chairman of the Social Democratic Party of Kyrgyzstan (SDPK) from 30 July 1999 to 23 September 2011.
